text: This is a call across the universe. My friends and I from Orange County New York have been listening to ytps especially cs188s for years, and I need to reach out here to see if there are more of us. We have developed almost a secondary dialect to our normal speech, and we can switch it on and off at a moments notice if we want to. Basically, it’s way of speaking where we constantly make ytp references, either directly quoting them or interjecting them into the current subject of conversation. Furthermore, we’ll randomly reverse words and do the whole flip word thing (like joj, hoh sis, etc). There’s no official name for it so I just jokingly call it ytpaniese. I am casting out into the world so that if any of you do exist in other places we may connect and share our love of ytp, and to prove to me and my friends that we’re not just actual dumbfucks.
